issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source metadata, violating Rule 6 (reject homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, search_page)
No substantive policy content available - only document titles and dates
event_type is 'unknown' because no actual speech or testimony content exists to classify
Cannot assess market impact, macro_context, or market_structure_context without accessing individual linked documents
Archival value is zero as a standalone record - individual speeches/testimony would need to be crawled separately
human_review_reason: The record accurately identifies the source as a non-archivable listing page. No human review needed - clear Rule 6 rejection applies.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/listing page providing titles of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's remarks, speeches, and congressional testimony from December 2025 through March 2026. No substantive policy content is available in this source; it merely indexes individual documents. Actual archival content would require visiting each linked speech or statement page.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source serves only as an index to Treasury Secretary remarks and cannot be archived as a standalone research document. Individual speech pages would need to be crawled separately for substantive policy content relevant to market structure or macro catalysts.
